_comment: App Manager repository index. Host this file plus the APKs somewhere your phone can reach (a static web server, a GitHub raw URL, an nginx folder, etc.), then paste this file's URL into App Manager > Settings > Repository URL. 'apk' may be an absolute URL or a path relative to this index. 'versionCode' MUST increase with every release so the manager can tell an update apart from what's installed.

apps.label: Lull
apps.description: A dark-first music & white-noise player built around safe repeat-one looping.
